    2. .vimrc - linux

    .vimrc - linux

    September 02, 2021  

    $> -> terminal.
    #> -> terminal con acceso root.

    Editando .vimrc

    $> vim $HOME/.vimrc

    «««< HEAD

    =======

    b9b9922 (postAD)

    colorscheme landscape
set encoding=utf-8
set shiftwidth=3
set smartindent
set ignorecase
set autoindent
set tabstop=3
set mouse=a
set showmatch
set incsearch
set smartcase
set hlsearch
set wildmenu
set cindent
set number
set autoread
set clipboard=unnamedplus
syntax on

nnoremap<F5> <Esc>:w<CR>:!chmod u+x %:p<enter>:!clear<enter>:!%:p<enter>
nnoremap<C-T> :tabnew<CR> "Para que funcione debe ser tabs
nnoremap<C-W> :tabclose<CR> "Osea :tabnew c.cpp
nnoremap<C-Left> :tabprevious<CR> "Y funcionara
nnoremap<C-Right> :tabnext<CR>
nnoremap<Tab> :tabnext<CR>



inoremap<F5> <Esc>:w<enter>:!chmod u+x %:p<enter>:!clear<enter>:!%:p<enter>
inoremap ( ()<Esc>i
inoremap ; ;<CR>
inoremap [ []<Esc>i
inoremap ' ''<Esc>i
inoremap " ""<Esc>i
inoremap { {}<Esc>i
inoremap {<CR> {<CR>}<Esc>ko

let g:airline#extensions#tabline#enabled = 1

    Gracias hermano :)

    Tags: vim

    Categories: vimrc

    Updated: September 02, 2021
